# {{PROJECT_DISPLAY_NAME}}

Production-oriented Fastify, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and JWT API starter generated with LaunchStack CLI.

## Included

- Fastify
- TypeScript
- Prisma ORM
- PostgreSQL
- Docker Compose
- JWT access and refresh tokens
- Password hashing
- Registration and login routes
- Refresh-token rotation
- Logout and token revocation
- Protected profile route
- User and admin roles
- Authentication and authorization middleware
- Environment configuration
- Structured logging
- CORS
- Central error handling
- Health endpoints
- Graceful shutdown
- Vitest tests

## Setup

Install dependencies:

    npm install

Start PostgreSQL:

    npm run db:up

Create the initial migration:

    npm run prisma:migrate -- --name init

Start development mode:

    npm run dev

## Authentication Routes

Register:

    POST /api/auth/register

Login:

    POST /api/auth/login

Refresh tokens:

    POST /api/auth/refresh

Logout:

    POST /api/auth/logout

View authenticated user:

    GET /api/auth/me

Send access tokens using:

    Authorization: Bearer <access-token>

## Example Registration Body

    {
      "email": "user@example.com",
      "password": "secure-password",
      "name": "Example User"
    }

## Environment Variables

    DATABASE_URL
    JWT_ACCESS_SECRET
    JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
    JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN
    JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN

Never use the default JWT secrets in production.

## Quality Commands

Run tests:

    npm test

Run type checking:

    npm run typecheck

Build:

    npm run build

## Generated by

LaunchStack CLI

https://www.npmjs.com/package/launchstack-cli
